description_long: This object consists of two cylindrical barrels, one standing upright and the other lying on its side. Both barrels have a metallic, slightly weathered appearance with visible horizontal banding for structural reinforcement. The surface is matte gray, suggesting galvanized steel or similar metal, and the barrels appear to be empty, as the open end of the horizontal barrel is visible. There are no visible handles or lids, and the barrels are of medium size, suitable for use as storage or waste receptacles in urban environments. The exterior is plain, with no visible markings, labels, or symbols. These barrels are commonly found in alleys, construction sites, or near industrial buildings.
description: Two medium-sized, gray metal barrels with horizontal banding, one upright and one lying open on its side, both unmarked and lidless.
description_view_0: Both barrels are visible, with one upright and the other lying on its side, showing the open end.
description_view_1: The upright barrel is centered, with the side barrel mostly obscured behind it.
description_view_2: The open end of the horizontal barrel is clearly visible, with the upright barrel beside it.
description_view_3: The upright barrel is centered, with the side barrel partially visible behind it.
